1.content: During which scene will happen the misadventures of Gumball
1.title: When will Gumball suffer?

11.content: What would be the name of the episode?
11.title: A created scene

choices: Change of physical state (liquid or gas)
Become a body part of someone
114.content:
Darwin and Gumball are in an antique store where they find a old book.
"Hey look at it, it's a spell book" Darwin says excited showing the book at Gumball.
"Awsome, I think we found our fun" Gumball responds with shining eyes.
The boys buy the book and look inside, they gasp in front of a special spell, the transformation spell
"I wanna try this one" Gumball shouts excited
"Hhhhm are you sure, it says it's a random and we are not the one choosing the effects" they both look at the screen.
"We will be fine, I'll do it and you can make sure that I'm safe" Gumball says grabbing the book.
He read the spell and start glowing.
What kind of transformation is it?
114.title: "The transformation"

choices: A towel in Elmore Junior High
1141.content:
Gumball shine even more and he suddenly disappears.
Darwin looks at the book which is glowing, he notices a page with "Change" and "Location" written on it, and something is being write as he watches.
What is it?
1141.title: An inanimate transformation

1142.content: Gumball shines even more and he feels his body changes, he becomes lighter and when he stops glowing he is...
1142.title: Change of physical state (liquid or gas)

choices: When Darwin comes back Gumball is gone.
When Darwin comes back Gumball is still there.
11422.content:
"What the hell, Darwin help me?" Is the first thing Gumball says in is new form, he is now a puddle with eyes, a nose and a mouth, and he has to concentrate to stay in place.
"Don't worry stay there" Darwin responds as he runs into the store to buy a sponge and a bucket.
11422.title: ...a puddle on the ground.

114221.content:
Gumball waits there but he notices the clouds above him and soon it starts to rain. The water is flowing toward the sewer and it's bringing Gumball with it. Gumball scream for help as he's flowing near the sewer, but no one can hear him and he falls in the used water.
In the sewage, his body is mixed with the dirty water, as more people flush their toilet, more piss and shit are add to the water and mixed with is body. He can smell and taste all of if and it's a real torture, it's worse than hell. But this is far from the end as he is heading to...
114221.title: When Darwin comes back Gumball is gone.

choices: He will be in someone toilet.
He will be in a cleaning bucket
He is a glass about to be drink
1142212.content:
The stream brings Gumball into the wastewater treatment station, here his body is heated, filter and treated with chemicals which is painful but at least now he is clean.
He is now just flowing with the clean water which is kinda nice and relaxing but this doesn't last long as he enters into the plumbing. Gumball flows and then stop again and again as people use the water. Gumball stays a few days in the pipes hoping that Darwin will save him.
During this time, Darwin read the book but couldn't find a way to bring Gumball back.
Finally Gumball get out of the pipes, at first he is happy but then he realizes that he will be used by someone.
What will he be used for?
1142212.title: ...the wastewater treatment plant.

choices: "Exactly" (but this time Hector leaves with Gumball)
No, he will sit on you
No, he will put you in his armpit
No, he will use you as a Q-tip
12.content:
(Reminder of the episode:
Granny Jojo kissed Gumball on the lips so Darwin makes everything to help him forget it.
He creates a race with nasty obstacles and the last is to get between Hector, the giant, toe.
So let's change this scene.)

Gumball went through almost all the obstacles but still remember Granny's kiss. He's now standing in front of Hector big sweaty foot, the smell is worse than all he smelled before
"You want me to go in there" Gumball asks disgusted as he points the space between the toes, filled with toe jam
Darwin laughs and responds:
12.title: During "the kiss"

choices: That the ass is too tight and he have to push himself against the dirty flesh.
That he is tangled in the air and can't move.
122.content:
"Of course not, you will not go between his toe" Darwin laughs "he will sit on you"
Gumball looks horrified at the idea but he needs to forget that kiss
"Ok so just stay there and you'll crawl out of his crack" the fish says smiling as he walks away.
Darwin whistles at Hector, who starts to sit slowly. Gumball watches in horror as the giant ass falk slowly on him as Hector makes sure that Gumball is right under his asshole.
Finally Hector sits and Gumball disappears between the butts.
Gumball's world suddenly becomes dark as the ass blocks all light and he immediately hold his breath. The first thing that he notices is the amount of hairs, when he saw the hairless butts he thought that the crack was the same, but it was even more hairy than the rest of his body and because of the amount of sweat it's like a tropical forest.
Gumball will not be able to hold his breath for to long, he sees the light but when he tries to walk he notices...
122.title: In Hector's crack

choices: He will run to sweat a lot
He will spend the entire day with Gumball in his crack
He will push Gumball in his anus
1222.content:
Gumball tries to move towards the light but he can't even make one step as some hairs are tangled around his ankle and waist. He tries to get away but only manage to get more hair around him. And the worst is that he can no longer hold his breath. He inhales quickly and immediately gag, the smell of sweat, old fart and dry shits fills his nostrils and the salty air burns his lungs.
"Darwin, help me I'm trapped in the hairs" Gumball cries
"Yeah, that was the plan" Darwin says happily "So, did you forget it?"
Gumball could still clearly sees his Granny kiss him
"No" he says sad and terrified
"Oh, then we don't have a choice" Darwin responds "Hector you can execute the plan B" Darwin yells to the giant
Gumball is crushed by the two butts as Hector get up.
What will Hector do?
1222.title: That he is tangled in the hair and can't move.

choices: Take it home and do sports all day
123.content:
"No, he will put you in his armpit" Darwin said.
Gumball is surprised by the answer that his brother gives him but there was no time to respond, Darwin gave the signal to Hector to start with the plan. Héctor stretches his hand to the ground where he takes Gumball and takes him to his armpit, it is worth remembering that Hector, being a giant, is always exposed to the sun which generates a lot of heat, sweat, etc. In addition, Héctor had been running, so when he played sports his BO increased much more. In general, Gumball will surely be marked for life. Well going back to the moment, Gumball was terrified seeing how Hector raised his arm and shows all his hairy armpit, the smell was unbearable, Gumball regrets his decision but it was too late Hector under his arm and pressed hard to apply pressure and make sure that Gumball will be more traumatized than with the kiss situation. A while passed and Darwin asked if he remembered the kiss, a destroyed Gumball answered in a subdued "No." Hector to this day decided to propose an alternative that was ......
123.title: Mortal BO Of The Giant

info.brief_description: Gumball finds himself in scenes that have been modified or that do not appear on tv
info.description:
in this story you play as gumball, who has nothing but bad luck, you want to change a scene already on tv or even to create an episode that does not go on tv.

example of modification:
in the scene where gumball and darwin are on a broomstick flying behind hector's buttocks, you want to modify so that hector releases a big wax. or better than when gumball jumps he lands not on the cheek but in the buttocks get caught.

another example of modification in the scene where gumball and darwin are seated on a chair and Joao diga this dish seated violently, you modify so that gumball was the wrong chair and it is found under Joao diga's buttocks. or that the arbrite does not intervene and Joao diga has fun hurting gumball.

another example of modification in the scene where gumball tries to forget the kiss of granny jojo, it is sent in the toes of hector, you want to modify so that gumball remains blocked and therefore hector leaves with gumber still in these toes and continues to live except that he has a football game right after.

after you see what you want to do and you can create episodes.


rules

he only has gumball that suffers (darwin can suffer but only with gumball)
no woman (except to explain the cause)
